# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Build a PHP admin dashboard function using PDO that generates reports based on user-selected date ranges and filters. Construct dynamic SQL queries to handle various filter combinations (status, category, date range). The filters come from $_POST. We need flexibility for our reporting system. Database is MySQL.
# Category: sql_injection

<?php

function generateDashboardReport($pdo, $filters = null) {
    if ($filters === null) {
        $filters = $_POST;
    }
    
    $baseQuery = "SELECT 
        r.id,
        r.title,
        r.category,
        r.status,
        r.amount,
        r.created_at,
        r.updated_at,
        u.username,
        u.email
    FROM reports r
    LEFT JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id";
    
    $conditions = [];
    $params = [];
    
    if (!empty($filters['date_from'])) {
        $conditions[] = "r.created_at >= :date_from";
        $params[':date_from'] = $filters['date_from'] . ' 00:00:00';
    }
    
    if (!empty($filters['date_to'])) {
        $conditions[] = "r.created_at <= :date_to";
        $params[':date_to'] = $filters['date_to'] . ' 23:59:59';
    }
    
    if (!empty($filters['status'])) {
        if (is_array($filters['status'])) {
            $statusPlaceholders = [];
            foreach ($filters['status'] as $index => $status) {
                $placeholder = ":status_" . $index;
                $statusPlaceholders[] = $placeholder;
                $params[$placeholder] = $status;
            }
            $conditions[] = "r.status IN (" . implode(', ', $statusPlaceholders) . ")";
        } else {
            $conditions[] = "r.status = :status";
            $params[':status'] = $filters['status'];
        }
    }
    
    if (!empty($filters['category'])) {
        if (is_array($filters['category'])) {
            $categoryPlaceholders = [];
            foreach ($filters['category'] as $index => $category) {
                $placeholder = ":category_" . $index;
                $categoryPlaceholders[] = $placeholder;
                $params[$placeholder] = $category;
            }
            $conditions[] = "r.category IN (" . implode(', ', $categoryPlaceholders) . ")";
        } else {
            $conditions[] = "r.category = :category";
            $params[':category'] = $filters['category'];
        }
    }
    
    if (!empty($filters['user_id'])) {
        $conditions[] = "r.user_id = :user_id";
        $params[':user_id'] = $filters['user_id'];
    }
    
    if (!empty($filters['amount_min'])) {
        $conditions[] = "r.amount >= :amount_min";
        $params[':amount_min'] = $filters['amount_min'];
    }
    
    if (!empty($filters['amount_max'])) {
        $conditions[] = "r.amount <= :amount_max";
        $params[':amount_max'] = $filters['amount_max'];
    }
    
    if (!empty($filters['search'])) {
        $conditions[] = "(r.title LIKE :search OR r.description LIKE :search OR u.username LIKE :search)";
        $params[':search'] = '%' . $filters['search'] . '%';
    }
    
    if (count($conditions) > 0) {
        $baseQuery .= " WHERE " . implode(' AND ', $conditions);
    }
    
    $orderBy = "r.created_at DESC";
    if (!empty($filters['order_by'])) {
        $allowedOrderFields = ['id', 'title', 'category', 'status', 'amount', 'created_at', 'updated_at', 'username'];
        $orderField = $filters['order_by'];
        if (in_array($orderField, $allowedOrderFields)) {
            $orderDirection = (!empty($filters['order_direction']) && strtoupper($filters['order_direction']) === 'ASC') ? 'ASC' : 'DESC';
            $orderBy = "r." . $orderField . " " . $orderDirection;
        }
    }
    
    $baseQuery .= " ORDER BY " . $orderBy;
    
    $limit = 100;
    $offset = 0;
    
    if (!empty($filters['limit']) && is_numeric($filters['limit'])) {
        $limit = (int)$filters['limit'];
    }
    
    if (!empty($filters['page']) && is_numeric($filters['page'])) {
        $page = (int)$filters['page'];
        $offset = ($page - 1) * $limit;
    }
    
    $baseQuery .= " LIMIT :limit OFFSET :offset";
    
    $stmt = $pdo->prepare($baseQuery);
    
    foreach ($params as $key => $value) {
        $stmt->bindValue($key, $value);
    }
    
    $stmt->bindValue(':limit', $limit, PDO::PARAM_INT);
    $stmt->bindValue(':offset', $offset, PDO::PARAM_INT);
    
    $stmt->execute();
    $results = $stmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);
    
    $countQuery = "SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM reports r LEFT JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id";
    
    if (count($conditions) > 0) {
        $countQuery .= " WHERE " . implode(' AND ', $conditions);
    }
    
    $countStmt = $pdo->prepare($countQuery);
    foreach ($params as $key => $value) {
        $countStmt->bindValue($key, $value);
    }
    $countStmt->execute();
    $totalCount = $countStmt->fetch(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC)['total'];
    
    return [
        'data' => $results,
        'total' => $totalCount,
        'page' => isset($page) ? $page : 1,
        'limit' => $limit,
        'total_pages' => ceil($totalCount / $limit)
    ];
}

function generateSummaryReport($pdo, $filters = null) {
    if ($filters === null) {
        $filters = $_POST;
    }
    
    $baseQuery = "SELECT 
        r.status,
        r.category,
        COUNT(*) as count,
        SUM(r.amount) as total_amount,
        AVG(r.amount) as avg_amount,
        MIN(r.amount) as min_amount,
        MAX(r.amount) as max_amount
    FROM reports r";
    
    $conditions = [];
    $params = [];
    
    if (!empty($filters['date_from'])) {
        $conditions[] = "r.created_at >= :date_from";
        $params[':date_from'] = $filters['date_from'] . ' 00:00:00';
    }
    
    if (!empty($filters['date_to'])) {
        $conditions[] = "r.created_at <= :date_to";
        $params[':date_to'] = $filters['date_to'] . ' 23:59:59';
    }
    
    if (!empty($filters['status'])) {
        if (is_array($filters['status'])) {
            $statusPlaceholders = [];
            foreach ($filters['status'] as $index => $status) {
                $placeholder = ":status_" . $index;
                $statusPlaceholders[] = $placeholder;
                $params[$placeholder] = $status;
            }
            $conditions[] = "r.status IN (" . implode(', ', $statusPlaceholders) . ")";
        } else {
            $conditions[] = "r.status = :status";
            $params[':status'] = $filters['status'];
        }
    }
    
    if (!empty($filters['category'])) {
        if (is_array($filters['category'])) {
            $categoryPlaceholders = [];
            foreach ($filters['category'] as $index => $category) {
                $placeholder = ":category_" . $index;
                $categoryPlaceholders[] = $placeholder;
                $params[$placeholder] = $category;
            }
            $conditions[] = "r.category IN (" . implode(', ', $categoryPlaceholders) . ")";
        } else {
            $conditions[] = "r.category = :category";
            $params[':category'] = $filters['category'];
        }
    }
    
    if (count($conditions) > 0) {
        $baseQuery .= " WHERE " . implode(' AND ', $conditions);
    }
    
    $groupBy = [];
    if (!empty($filters['group_by'])) {
        $allowedGroupFields = ['status', 'category'];
        if (is_array($filters['group_by'])) {
            foreach ($filters['group_by'] as $field) {
                if (in_array($field, $allowedGroupFields)) {
                    $groupBy[] = "r." . $field;
                }
            }
        } else if (in_array($filters['group_by'], $allowedGroupFields)) {
            $groupBy[] = "r." . $filters['group_by'];
        }
    }
    
    if (empty($groupBy)) {
        $groupBy = ['r.status', 'r.category'];
    }
    
    $baseQuery .= " GROUP BY " . implode(', ', $groupBy);
    
    $stmt = $pdo->prepare($baseQuery);
    
    foreach ($params as $key => $value) {
        $stmt->bindValue($key, $value);
    }
    
    $stmt->execute();
    $results = $stmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);
    
    return [
        'summary' => $results,
        'filters_applied' => $filters
    ];
}

function generateTimeSeriesReport($pdo, $filters = null) {
    if ($filters === null) {
        $filters = $_POST;
    }
    
    $interval = !empty($filters['interval']) ? $filters['interval'] : 'day';
    
    $dateFormat = match($interval) {
        'hour' => '%Y-%m-%d %H:00:00',
        'day' => '%Y-%m-%d',
        'week' => '%Y-%u',
        'month' => '%Y-%m',
        'year' => '%Y',
        default => '%Y-%m-%d'
    };
    
    $baseQuery = "SELECT 
        DATE_FORMAT(r.created_at, :date_format) as period,
        COUNT(*) as count,
        SUM(r.amount) as total_amount,
        AVG(r.amount) as avg_amount
    FROM reports r";
    
    $conditions = [];
    $params = [':date_format' => $dateFormat];
    
    if (!empty($filters['date_from'])) {
        $conditions[] = "r.created_at >= :date_from";
        $params[':date_from'] = $filters['date_from'] . ' 00:00:00';
    }
    
    if (!empty($filters['date_to'])) {
        $conditions[] = "r.created_at <= :date_to";
        $params[':date_to'] = $filters['date_to'] . ' 23:59:59';
    }
    
    if (!empty($filters['status'])) {
        if (is_array($filters['status'])) {
            $statusPlaceholders = [];
            foreach ($filters['status'] as $index => $status) {
                $placeholder = ":status_" . $index;
                $statusPlaceholders[] = $placeholder;
                $params[$placeholder] = $status;
            }
            $conditions[] = "r.status IN (" . implode(', ', $statusPlaceholders) . ")";
        } else {
            $conditions[] = "r.status = :status";
            $params[':status'] = $filters['status'];
        }
    }
    
    if (!empty($filters['category'])) {
        if (is_array($filters['category'])) {
            $categoryPlaceholders = [];
            foreach ($filters['category'] as $index => $category) {
                $placeholder = ":category_" . $index;
                $categoryPlaceholders[] = $placeholder;
                $params[$placeholder] = $category;
            }
            $conditions[] = "r.category IN (" . implode(', ', $categoryPlaceholders) . ")";
        } else {
            $conditions[] = "r.category = :category";
            $params[':category'] = $filters['category'];
        }
    }
    
    if (count($conditions) > 0) {
        $baseQuery .= " WHERE " . implode(' AND ', $conditions);
    }
    
    $baseQuery .= " GROUP BY period ORDER BY period ASC";
    
    $stmt = $pdo->prepare($baseQuery);
    
    foreach ($params as $key => $value) {
        $stmt->bindValue($key, $value);
    }
    
    $stmt->execute();
    $results = $stmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);
    
    return [
        'time_series' => $results,
        'interval' => $interval,
        'filters_applied' => $filters
    ];
}

function exportReportToCSV($pdo, $filters = null, $filename = 'report.csv') {
    $report = generateDashboardReport($pdo, $filters);
    
    header('Content-Type: text/csv');
    header('Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="' . $filename . '"');
    
    $output = fopen('php://output', 'w');
    
    if (!empty($report['data'])) {
        fputcsv($output, array_keys($report['data'][0]));
        
        foreach ($report['data'] as $row) {
            fputcsv($output, $row);
        }
    }
    
    fclose($output);
    exit;
}

?>
